nodes.name: hwWlanWidsAttackHistoryTable
nodes.description: This table describes historical information about attacking devices.

nodes.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiDevTable
nodes.description: This table describes information about non-Wi-Fi devices.

nodes.name: hwWlanWidsDynamicBlacklistTable
nodes.description: This table describes information about dynamic blacklists.

nodes.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevTable
nodes.description: This table describes detected device information.

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjAttackDevMAC
children.description: MAC address of the attack device (MacAddress).

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjRogueDevSSID
children.description: SSID of the rogue device (OCTET STRING).

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjRogueDevType
children.description: Type of the rogue device (Integer32).

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjNonWifiDeviceType
children.description: Type of the non-Wi-Fi device (Integer32).

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjDetRadioId
children.description: Radio ID of the monitor AP (Integer32).

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjAttackType
children.description: Type of the attack device (Integer32).

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjMonitorFrequency
children.description: Character string description of the monitor frequency (OCTET STRING).

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjDeviceCount
children.description: Count of the specified device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsObjDetAPIP
children.description: IP address of the monitor AP (IpAddress).

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatDeAuthenFloodAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatWapiAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatOthersSpoofAttack
children.description: This object indicates the other types of spoofing frames.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatWpa2Attack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatStartTime
children.description: This object indicates the counting start time.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatWepShareKeyAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatDisassocReqFloodAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatAssocReqFloodAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatReassocReqFloodAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatEAPOLStartFloodAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatNullDataFloodAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackStatWeakIvAttack
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDynamicBlacklistAPTable
children.description: This table describes information about APs enabled with dynamic blacklists.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttDevTable
children.description: This table describes information about attacking devices.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttDevEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanWidsAttackDevMac.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevRougeAdhocCount
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevRougeBridgeCount
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevPermitClientCount
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevPermitBridgeCount
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevInterferenceBridgeCount
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevRougeAPCount
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevPermitAPCount
children.description: Counting.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevTable
children.description: This table describes detected device information.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwWlanWidsApDetDevApMac, hwWlanWidsApDetDevApRadioID and hwWlanWidsApDetDevMac.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevRogueFlag
children.description: This object indicates whether the device is a rogue device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevChannel
children.description: This object indicates the channel.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevType
children.description: This object indicates the device type.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevBSSID
children.description: This object indicates the BSSID of the detected device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevSsid
children.description: This object indicates the SSID.

children.name: hwWlanWidsApDetDevMac
children.description: This object indicates the MAC address of the detected device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorTable
children.description: This table describes information about monitoring devices.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorDevMac, hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorApMac, and hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorApRadioID.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorApLastDetTime
children.description: This object indicates the latest time when the device is detected.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorApId
children.description: This object indicates the AP ID.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorApMac
children.description: This object indicates the MAC address of the monitor AP.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetDevMonitorDetAtt
children.description: This objects indicates whether the detected device is an attack device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorTable
children.description: This table describes attack detection information about the monitoring AP.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorEntry
children.description: The indexes of this table are hwWlanWidsAttackDetorDevMac and hwWlanWidsAttackDetorApMac.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorChannel
children.description: This object indicates the channel of the device that implements the wireless attack detection.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorApMac
children.description: This object indicates the MAC address of the monitor AP.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorRSSI
children.description: This object indicates the RSSI of the device that implements the wireless attack detection.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorApName
children.description: This object indicates the name of the monitor AP.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorAttTypeBmp
children.description: This object indicates the attack type bitmap.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorFirstDetTimeFlood
children.description: This object indicates the first time when a flood attack is detected.

children.name: hwWlanWidsAttackDetorPacketBmpSpoof
children.description: This object indicates the flood attack packet bitmap.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiDevHistTable
children.description: This table describes historical records about non-Wi-Fi devices.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiDevHistEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistIndex.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistIndex
children.description: This object indicates the index of the table.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistMonitorApMac
children.description: This object indicates the MAC address of the monitor AP.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistDevFirstTime
children.description: This object indicates the first time when the non-Wi-Fi device is detected.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistFrequencyType
children.description: This object indicates the interference type of the non-Wi-Fi device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistDevLastTime
children.description: This object indicates the latest time when the non-Wi-Fi device is detected.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistInterferenceLevel
children.description: This object indicates the interference level of the non-Wi-Fi device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistRssi
children.description: This object indicates the RSSI.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistCenterFrequency
children.description: This object indicates the center frequency of the non-Wi-Fi device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistMonitorRadioId
children.description: This object indicates the radio ID of the monitor AP.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistDutycycle
children.description: This object indicates the duty cycle of the non-Wi-Fi device.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistMonitorRadioType
children.description: This object indicates the type of the monitor radio.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistMonitorAPChannel
children.description: This object indicates the working channel of the monitor AP.

children.name: hwWlanWidsDetNonWifiHistChannel
children.description: This object indicates the channel of the non-Wi-Fi device.

nodes.name: hwWlanWidsRogueHistoryTable
nodes.description: This table describes historical information about rogue devices.

children.name: hwWlanWidsRogueHistoryEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanWidsRogueDevMac.

children.name: hwWlanWidsRogueDevType
children.description: This object indicates the device type.

children.name: hwWlanWidsRogueDevAuthenMethod
children.description: This object indicates the authentication.

children.name: hwWlanWidsRogueDevSSID
children.description: This object indicates the SSID.

children.name: hwWlanWidsRogueDevChannel
children.description: This object indicates the channel.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetAttackDev
children.description: This object indicates deletion of the historical attack table.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetRogueHistoryByDevType
children.description: This object indicates that entries are deleted based on device types.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetAttackHistory
children.description: This object indicates deletion of historical attack records.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetDynamicBlacklist
children.description: This object indicates deletion of all dynamic blacklists.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetDetDevTableAll
children.description: This object indicates that all devices are deleted.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetDynamicBlacklistMac
children.description: This object indicates deletion of dynamic blacklist entries based on MAC addresses.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetAttackStat
children.description: This object indicates deletion of attack statistics.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetDetDevTableByType
children.description: This object indicates that entries are deleted based on device types.

children.name: hwWlanWidsResetRogueHistoryAll
children.description: This object indicates that all devices are deleted.
